proxyListHintHtml.message:
One proxy per line:
http://ip:port
http://user:password@ip:port
socks4://ip:port
socks5://ip:port
Authentication is supported only for HTTP proxies.
Legacy formats ip:port and ip:port:user:password are treated as HTTP.
Use # for comments.

proxyListPlaceholder.message:
http://user:password@1.1.1.1:1111 # home
socks5://2.2.2.2:1080 # office
3.3.3.3:8080 # legacy HTTP
